summary: Improvement cycle addressing external review #3 from gndrmnn. Two test files (reconcile_fernet_test.go and reconcile_credential_test.go) had five brittle substring assertions each removed from their TestXxxRotateScript_EmbeddedContent functions: checks for `CC-0081`, `forge.c5c3.io/rotation-completed-at`, `datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc)`, `strategic-merge-patch+json`, and `Secret update failed`. The `python3 << 'PYTHON'` structural probe was retained per the reviewer's explicit instruction, and a short inline comment now explains that deeper assertions on the embedded Python source are intentionally omitted as brittle against reformatting and covered by integration tests. Progress JSON moved from awaiting_external_review to improving, review JSON verdict updated to ADDRESSED with a resolution summary, and the review-patterns-from-external-feedback file for index-based container assertions logged the CC-0081 occurrence.

tests_checklist.item: Both tests pass after edit (verified via go test)
Structural probe (python3 << 'PYTHON') retained as explicitly requested by reviewer
No other tests in the file were regressed (full test file still compiles with go vet)

code_quality_checklist.item: Edit is minimal and surgical — only the five lines the reviewer flagged plus corresponding no-longer-needed checks were removed
Added comment accurately explains why deeper assertions are omitted
Changes symmetric between reconcile_fernet_test.go and reconcile_credential_test.go
No scope creep into unrelated tests or production code

security_checklist.item: Test-only changes; no production code modified
No new inputs, secrets, or boundary changes introduced

architecture_checklist.item: Unit tests no longer reach into embedded Python source — coupling between test and implementation reduced
Integration/e2e tests (envtest TestRotationApplyEndToEnd_EnvTest from task 4.1) remain the owners of behavior assertions about the annotation and PATCH path

dry_yagni_checklist.item: Dead assertions that duplicated what integration tests already verify were removed

fail_fast_checklist.item: Remaining assertions still fail fast if the script is not embedded or the python3 heredoc is lost

defensive_checklist.item: No defensive validation removed — all changes are in test code

next_steps: Progress phase is already flipped to improving; once automated verification confirms clean state, this feature can advance to the next phase in the planwerk pipeline.
